message:
fix(runtime,conformance): CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING return OK, add AnyArray matcher

- Re-fix CLIENT TRACKING ON/OFF and CLIENT CACHING YES/NO to return OK
  (matching Redis behavior) — reverted by concurrent agent, re-applied
- Update unit tests to assert OK instead of error
- Add AnyArray variant to conformance ExpectedFrame for matching any
  non-nil array response (needed for COMMAND DOCS dynamic output)
- Update command_docs fixtures to use any_array

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
